allowed_statement: This manuscript is an author-led preprint and has not yet undergone journal peer review.
The code, chain artifacts, validation ledgers, checksums, and reproduction commands are publicly available for reader verification in the associated GitHub repository.
Within the stated DEU full-objective likelihood configuration, the booked production chains support the reported scoped posterior summary.
The matched DEU/native comparison is reported descriptively under the same staged validation scope.

The formal and independent evidence-estimator diagnostics favor DEU over the native baseline within the internal validation protocol; this is reported as a caveated estimator result, not as peer-reviewed model superiority.
TT_lite was monitored as diagnostic context but was excluded from the sampled production and evidence likelihoods.
